rationale_per_step.add-composite-eval-smoke-script: DX/Infra: add a single 'eval:smoke' script that runs the existing pure zero-I/O smoke evals together. Improves DX, simplifies CI/docs/AGENTS, reduces repetition after the eval smoke work. No new tests.
rationale_per_step.research-orchestrator-mock-eval: Testing/Observability: add a hermetic scenario-level eval exercising more of the research agent loop (executeAgentLoop / orchestrator) using mocked LLM and no E2B/DB/keys. Current research-smoke only covers registry/rubric. Directly supports reliable deep research and measurable research quality per vision.
rationale_per_step.extend-ci-eval-coverage: Testing/Observability + DX: wire the remaining smoke evals (parse, merged, semantic-search-scenario, and future composite) into the CI verify job so all quality invariants run on every PR/merge. Addresses partial CI state after incremental eval additions.
